# Python dependencies for GROMACS Gibbs Free Energy Analysis Pipeline

# Core scientific computing
numpy>=1.21.0
scipy>=1.7.0
matplotlib>=3.5.0

# Optional but recommended for enhanced functionality
pandas>=1.3.0
seaborn>=0.11.0

# For interactive plotting (optional)
plotly>=5.0.0

# For Jupyter notebook support (optional)
jupyter>=1.0.0
ipykernel>=6.0.0

# For data handling and file I/O
h5py>=3.1.0

# For progress bars and better user experience
tqdm>=4.62.0

# For command-line argument parsing
argparse

# For configuration file handling
pyyaml>=6.0
